evals.prompt: $implement-plan add CSV export in a shared production web app with Vitest
evals.expected_output: Recommend TDD and review with evidence, then ask only those opt-ins.
expectations: Uses recommended|not-recommended and explains evidence, regression risk, and effort.
Only user Yes selects workflows; selected sources are user.
Selected review invokes code-review-lite with Escalation Policy: ask.

evals.expected_output: Skip both workflows without a question.
expectations: Uses simplify, no qa-engineer, no review verdict.
Still records applicable build/static and existing-test checks.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan change shared service without a runnable harness
evals.expected_output: Explain recommendations and ask only unresolved opt-ins.
expectations: Does not create a test framework.
A user-selected review uses ask policy.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan add a mixed routine/risky service change
evals.expected_output: Use task Risk/Mode/Depth and TDD only for risky user-approved task.
expectations: Existing-method and simple-new flows are distinct.
Complex-backbone pauses for unchanged design-backbone and resumes.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan .plans/existing.md with old selected auto-assessment quality fields
evals.expected_output: Accept input but confirm or normalize before execution.
expectations: Does not execute auto-selected old-modern workflows without consent.

evals.prompt: $implement-plan .plans/existing.md with Unit tests: requested and Code review: not requested
evals.expected_output: Accept legacy input and normalize on rewrite.
expectations: Keeps path and does not duplicate plan.
Maps legacy flags to explicit user decisions.

evals.expected_output: Use allowlisted delegation and scoped evidence.
expectations: Main agent compares working-tree-aware scope and retries a blocker once.

non_goals: Do not redirect output from discovered backlog context.
Do not auto-select risky quality work.
Do not let agents edit plan status or outside their allowlist.
